title: senecio divaricoides
intro: Senecio divaricoides, also known as bush geranium, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio divaricoides include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as treating wounds and skin irritations. Senecio divaricoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
